text:
(1) Any person residing in this state shall, upon request, be issued a distinctive license plate in support of lupus awareness and research bearing the phrase “Lupus Awareness”. Application for said license plate shall be filed with the commissioner in such form and detail as the commissioner shall prescribe.

(2) A distinctive plate issued pursuant to this section shall be issued in the same manner as other number plates upon payment of the regular registration fee prescribed by section four hundred one of this article; provided, however, that an additional annual service charge of twenty-five dollars shall be charged for such plates.

(3) Each twenty-five dollars received as the annual service charge under this section shall be deposited to the credit of the “lupus research and education fund” established pursuant to State Finance Law § 97-PPPP (Lupus research and education fund) and shall be used for research and education programs undertaken pursuant to State Finance Law § 97-PPPP (Lupus research and education fund) . * NB There are 6 § 404-y’s

# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 4
#### Article 14. Registration of Motor Vehicles
##### § 404-Y*5 — Distinctive lupus awareness license plates

(1) Any person residing in this state shall, upon request, be issued a distinctive license plate in support of lupus awareness and research bearing the phrase “Lupus Awareness”. Application for said license plate shall be filed with the commissioner in such form and detail as the commissioner shall prescribe.

(2) A distinctive plate issued pursuant to this section shall be issued in the same manner as other number plates upon payment of the regular registration fee prescribed by section four hundred one of this article; provided, however, that an additional annual service charge of twenty-five dollars shall be charged for such plates.

(3) Each twenty-five dollars received as the annual service charge under this section shall be deposited to the credit of the “lupus research and education fund” established pursuant to State Finance Law § 97-PPPP (Lupus research and education fund) and shall be used for research and education programs undertaken pursuant to State Finance Law § 97-PPPP (Lupus research and education fund) . * NB There are 6 § 404-y’s

*Last modified: Apr. 27, 2018*

Application for said license plate shall be filed with the commissioner in such form and detail as the commissioner shall prescribe.

A distinctive plate issued pursuant to this section shall be issued in the same manner as other number plates upon payment of the regular registration fee prescribed by section four hundred one of this article; provided, however, that an additional annual service charge of twenty-five dollars shall be charged for such plates.

Each twenty-five dollars received as the annual service charge under this section shall be deposited to the credit of the “lupus research and education fund” established pursuant to State Finance Law § 97-PPPP (Lupus research and education fund) and shall be used for research and education programs undertaken pursuant to State Finance Law § 97-PPPP (Lupus research and education fund) . * NB There are 6 § 404-y’s
